subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-07-19 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Man must strive to pass his days in the utmost joy, delight and fragrance, and this cannot be achieved save through the sweet-scented breezes of God and the exaltation of His Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: باید انسان بکوشد که ایام را بنهایت سرور و روح و ریحان بگذراند و این جز بنفحات الله و اعلاء کلمة الله میسر نشود
subcodes.subjects: @growth and progress is gradual and according to capacity, @definitions of a Baha'i; qualities of a Baha'i, @war and peace, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @religion as reality; definitions of religion
